title: ipv6_addr.h: Unnecessary stdio.h include
description:
The header ipv6_addr.h includes <stdio.h> (line 27) but uses nothing from it. The .c file does use snprintf, but that include belongs there, not in the public header.

What goes wrong: Transitive include bloat. Every file that includes ipv6_addr.h pulls in stdio.h unnecessarily, which can slow builds and increase coupling.

Fix: Remove '#include <stdio.h>' from ipv6_addr.h.

Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/ipv6_addr.h:27
